use_cases: Creating engaging, interactive backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adding subtle ambient animation to marketing sites without distracting from content
Enhancing user engagement on portfolio and creative project showcases
Providing visual feedback through ripple effects on interactive web experiences
Serving as a visually appealing container for content overlays in web applications
ai_summary: An interactive ripple background component that creates expanding ripple effects on user click and auto-generates ambient ripples every 3 seconds. Features a purple-to-pink gradient aesthetic with smooth fade-out animations. Designed to work as a full-screen container that can wrap and display child content while providing engaging visual feedback for users.
